summary:
The needle has been found—IPv6 loopback addresses were not being blocked by `app/validator.py` (allowing SSRF to the internal metadata service). The validator has been updated to catch `[::1]`, `[0:0:0:0:0:0:0:1]`, and any other loopback IPs via the `ipaddress` module (in addition to the existing checks).

`./test.sh` now passes (all tests green).
